steps.title: Identify the angle pair
steps.content: Because segment $BC$ is parallel to segment $AD$, line $t$ acts as a transversal through the two parallel segments. The angles labeled $x$ and $y$ are alternate interior angles.

steps.title: Use parallel-line angles
steps.content: Alternate interior angles are congruent, so $y=x$. Since $x=22$, it follows that $y=22$. The answer is A.
